title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: A video explainer on Pi Agent, which the creator describes as a unique approach to agent architecture with a "harness layer" that enables various applications like OpenClaw. The video compares Pi against frontier agents such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity.
